claude-local.focus: First release LIVE: STR001 'Where is James (DOTT remix)' by Anton Rotof — audio (256k AAC m4a; 98MB WAV master exceeds free-tier 50MB cap) + artwork in storage, row in releases. Next: test player on site; set BPM/beat_offset for the beat grid.
